chapter_title.ar: بَابُ قَطْعِ تَلْبِيَةِ الْمُحْرِمِ وَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 209 – Cutting off of Talbiyya by the one in Ihraam and what is upon him, from the deeds

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/238)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/238)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ مُفْرِدِ الْعُمْرَةِ عَلَيْهِ طَوَافُ النِّسَاءِ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions, from Ismail Bin Riyah,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassanasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the performer of the exclusive Umra, ‘Is there Tawaaf Al-Nisa upon him?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people from ‘Isma‘il ibn Rabah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who performs just al-‘Umrah; if he is required to perform Tawaf al-Nisa’. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, he is required to do so.’”
